hooks.command:
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qiE 'A_HQTCSDL.C_HQTCSDL' && echo "$f" | grep -qviE 'CHANGELOG_|DOCUMENTATION\.md|PLAN_' && ts=$(date +%Y%m%d) && log="/f/A_HQTCSDL/C_HQTCSDL/changelogs/CHANGELOG_${ts}.md" && mkdir -p /f/A_HQTCSDL/C_HQTCSDL/changelogs && { [ -f "$log" ] || printf '# Changelog %s

' "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d')" > "$log"; } && printf '- **%s** — `%s`
' "$(date '+%H:%M:%S')" "$f" >> "$log"; } 2>/dev/null || true
